name: Suspicious Mac System Log Cleared
notes:
This rule triggers when a local audit log is deleted.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: remotephone, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Indicator Removal on Host - Clear Mac System Logs
SIGMA Description: Detects deletion of local audit logs


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Mac OS X
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) contains any of [rm or unlink or shred]
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [/var/log or /Library/Logs/], Process Path (custom) contains any of [/Library/Logs/ or /var/log]
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Mac System Log Cleared on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Mac OS X
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) contains any of [rm or unlink or shred]
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [/var/log or /Library/Logs/], Process Path (custom) contains any of [/Library/Logs/ or /var/log]
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Mac System Logs Cleared
Event description: Detects when a local audit log is deleted.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
